summary: The diff modifies LocationMapExplorer.tsx with changes described in the file summary as implementing all four requirements: upper-left buttons (REQ-1), right-side popups (REQ-2), restored 3D/2D toggles (REQ-3), and removed bottom-left time display (REQ-4). The file summary explicitly confirms all four changes. However, the actual diff content is truncated, so full code-level verification is not possible. Based on the file summary description which directly references each requirement, all four appear to be implemented.
